<MLLD_GUIDE version="2.0.3">

mlld is a modular prompt scripting language for dynamically assembling context and orchestrating LLMs.

<QUICK_START>
Two syntax modes based on file extension:

**.mld (strict mode)** - Bare directives, text lines error
**.md or .mld.md (markdown mode)** - Slash prefix required, text becomes content

```mlld
>> Strict mode example (.mld file)
var @name = "Alice"
exe @greet(n) = `Hello @n!`
show @greet(@name)

>> Same code in markdown mode (.mld.md file) - add / prefix
/var @name = "Alice"
/exe @greet(n) = `Hello @n!`
/show @greet(@name)
```

This guide uses **strict mode** (bare directives) in all examples.
</QUICK_START>

<MODULES>
This guide is modular. Load individual sections as needed:

| Module | Contents |
|--------|----------|
| docs/llm/llms-overview.txt | Purpose, mental model, two modes |
| docs/llm/llms-core-rules.txt | The 13 core rules with examples |
| docs/llm/llms-core.txt | Variables, templates, file loading, exe, run, builtins, escaping |
| docs/llm/llms-flow-control.txt | if, when, for, foreach, while, loop, bail |
| docs/llm/llms-effects.txt | Pipelines, labels, guards, hooks |
| docs/llm/llms-modules.txt | Import/export, registry, publishing, versioning |
| docs/llm/llms-mcp.txt | MCP export, import, tool collections, reshaping |
| docs/llm/llms-output.txt | output, log, append, stream |
| docs/llm/llms-patterns.txt | Common workflow patterns |
| docs/llm/llms-cli.txt | CLI usage, checkpoint, validation, skills |
| docs/llm/llms-config.txt | Config files, policy, environments |
| docs/llm/llms-sdk.txt | SDK execution modes, state, analysis |
| docs/llm/llms-security.txt | Signing, MCP security, audit log |
| docs/llm/llms-reference.txt | Quick reference tables |

For full context injection, use `llms-combined.txt` which contains all modules.
</MODULES>

<CORE_CONCEPTS>
**Directives** - Commands: `var`, `show`, `run`, `for`, `loop`, `when`, `if`, `import`, `export`, `exe`

**Variables** - Always `@` prefixed: `var @x = 1`, then use `@x`

**Templates** - Backticks interpolate: `` `Hello @name` ``. For longer prompts: `exe @f(x) = template "file.att"`

**File loading** - Angle brackets: `<README.md>`, `<src/*.ts>`

**Executables** - Reusable functions: `exe @f(x) = ...`

**Blocks** - Multi-statement bodies: `exe @f(x) = [ let @y = @x * 2; => @y ]`

**Pipelines** - Chain transforms: `@data | @json | @validate`

**Modules** - Code reuse: `import { @helper } from @corp/utils`; MCP tools: `import tools from mcp "npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-everything" as @tools`
</CORE_CONCEPTS>

<ESSENTIAL_PATTERNS>

**Variables and output:**
```mlld
var @name = "Alice"
var @data = <config.json>
show `Hello @name, config: @data.version`
```

**Executables with blocks:**
```mlld
exe @process(items) = [
  let @validated = for @item in @items when @item.valid => @item
  let @transformed = foreach @transform(@validated)
  => @transformed
]
```

**Control flow:**
```mlld
if @isProd [
  show "Production mode"
]

when [
  @score >= 90 => show "Excellent"
  @score >= 70 => show "Good"
  * => show "Needs work"
]

for @item in @items [
  let @result = @process(@item)
  show `Done: @result`
]

for @key, @value in @config => show `@key: @value`
```

**Parallel execution:**
```mlld
for parallel(3) @task in @tasks => @runTask(@task)
var @results = || @fetchA() || @fetchB() || @fetchC()
```

**External templates (.att files):**
```mlld
>> For prompts longer than a few lines, use .att files
exe @systemPrompt(context) = template "./prompts/system.att"
exe @welcome(name, role) = template "./prompts/welcome.att"

>> Template collections for directories
import templates from "@root/agents" as @agents(message, context)
show @agents["alice"](@msg, @ctx)
```

**Modules:**
```mlld
import { @helper } from @corp/utils
import "@agents" as @registry

exe @myFunc(x) = @helper(@x) | @transform
export { @myFunc }
```

**Tool collections:**
```mlld
var tools @agentTools = {
  summarize: { mlld: @summarize, description: "Summarize text" },
  deleteRepo: { mlld: @deleteRepo, labels: [destructive] }
}

env @agent with { tools: @agentTools } [
  run cmd { claude -p @task }
]
```
</ESSENTIAL_PATTERNS>

<SEE_ALSO>
- Documentation: https://mlld.ai/docs
- Source & examples: https://github.com/mlld-lang/mlld
</SEE_ALSO>

</MLLD_GUIDE>
